programme.title: Girl Meets World
गर्ल मीट्स वर्ल्ड
கேர்ள் மீட்ஸ் வர்ல்ட்
గర్ల్ మీట్స్ వరల్డ్
programme.desc: Middle-school student Riley Matthews faces many problems growing up but finds solace in Maya Hart, her best friend, who helps her overcome all the obstacles.

मिडिल स्कूल की छात्रा रिले मैथ्यूज को बड़े होने के दौरान कई समस्याओं का सामना करना पड़ता है, लेकिन उसे अपनी सबसे अच्छी दोस्त माया हार्ट से सांत्वना मिलती है, जो उसे बाधाओं को पार करने में मदद करती है।
ரைலி மேத்யூஸ் பல பிரச்சனைகளை எதிர்கொள்கிறார், ஆனால் அவரது சிறந்த தோழியான மாயா ஹார்ட்டிடம் ஆறுதல் காண்கிறார்.
చిన్నతనం నుండి అనేక సమస్యలు ఎదుర్కొంటున్న పాఠశాల విద్యార్థి రిలే మాథ్యూస్ కి, ఆమె ప్రాణ స్నేహితురాలు మాయా అండగా ఉంటుంది.

programme.title: Wizards of Waverly Place
विज़र्ड्स ऑफ वेवर्ली प्लेस
விஸார்ட்ஸ் ஆஃப் வேவர்லி பிளேஸ்
విజార్డ్స్ ఆఫ్ వేవర్లీ ప్లేస్
programme.desc: Alex, Justin and Max Russo have descended from a long line of wizards. They must compete with each other in order to become the sole wizard of their family and hiding their abilities from the world.
एलेक्स, जस्टिन और मैक्स रूसो जादूगरों की एक लंबी परंपरा से निकले हैं। उन्हें अपने परिवार का एकमात्र जादूगर बनने और अपनी क्षमताओं को दुनिया से छिपाने के लिए एक-दूसरे से प्रतिस्पर्धा करनी होगी।
மந்திர சக்திகளையுடைய மூவர் குடும்பத்தின் ஒரே மந்திரவாதி ஆக மாற, தங்கள் திறன்களை மறைத்து ஒருவருக்கொருவர் மோத வேண்டும்.
న్యూయార్క్ లో ఉండే రుస్సోకుటుంబయజమాని మంత్రగాడుకావడంతో పిల్లలు కూడానేర్చుకుంటారు,అందులోనేర్పరికి మంత్రదండం ఇవ్వబడుతుంది.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie
लिव एण्ड मैडी
லிவ் அண்ட் மேடி
లివ్ అండ్ మాడీ
programme.desc: Maddie's life turns chaotic when her twin sister Liv, a superstar, returns to high school. Matters get worse as their parents work for the same school.
मैडी की ज़िंदगी तब उथल-पुथल हो जाती है जब उसकी जुड़वाँ बहन लिव, जो एक सुपरस्टार है, हाई स्कूल लौटती है। हालात और भी बदतर हो जाते हैं क्योंकि उनके माता-पिता भी एक ही स्कूल में काम करते हैं।
பள்ளிக்கு திரும்பும் லிவ்வால், மேடிக்கு குழப்பமானது, பெற்றோர்களும் அதே பள்ளியில் பணிபுரிவதால் விஷயங்கள் மேலும் மோசமானது.
సూపర్‌స్టార్ అయిన తన కవల సోదరి లివ్ పాఠశాలకు రావడం, తమ తల్లితండ్రులు కూడా అక్కడే పనిచేయడంతో మాడీ పరిస్థితి దిగజారుతుంది.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie
लिव एण्ड मैडी
லிவ் அண்ட் மேடி
లివ్ అండ్ మాడీ
programme.desc: Maddie's life turns chaotic when her twin sister Liv, a superstar, returns to high school. Matters get worse as their parents work for the same school.

பள்ளிக்கு திரும்பும் லிவ்வால், மேடிக்கு குழப்பமானது, பெற்றோர்களும் அதே பள்ளியில் பணிபுரிவதால் விஷயங்கள் மேலும் மோசமானது.
సూపర్‌స్టార్ అయిన తన కవల సోదరి లివ్ పాఠశాలకు రావడం, తమ తల్లితండ్రులు కూడా అక్కడే పనిచేయడంతో మాడీ పరిస్థితి దిగజారుతుంది.

programme.title: Girl Meets World
गर्ल मीट्स वर्ल्ड
கேர்ள் மீட்ஸ் வர்ல்ட்
గర్ల్ మీట్స్ వరల్డ్
programme.desc: Middle-school student Riley Matthews faces many problems growing up but finds solace in Maya Hart, her best friend, who helps her overcome all the obstacles.

मिडिल स्कूल की छात्रा रिले मैथ्यूज को बड़े होने के दौरान कई समस्याओं का सामना करना पड़ता है, लेकिन उसे अपनी सबसे अच्छी दोस्त माया हार्ट से सांत्वना मिलती है, जो उसे बाधाओं को पार करने में मदद करती है।
ரைலி மேத்யூஸ் பல பிரச்சனைகளை எதிர்கொள்கிறார், ஆனால் அவரது சிறந்த தோழியான மாயா ஹார்ட்டிடம் ஆறுதல் காண்கிறார்.
చిన్నతనం నుండి అనేక సమస్యలు ఎదుర్కొంటున్న పాఠశాల విద్యార్థి రిలే మాథ్యూస్ కి, ఆమె ప్రాణ స్నేహితురాలు మాయా అండగా ఉంటుంది.

programme.title: Hannah Montana
हन्ना मोंटाना
ஹானா மோன்டானா
హన్నా మోంటానా
programme.desc: Miley Stewart, an average teenage girl, lives a double life as a famous pop singer named Hannah Montana and constantly tries to conceal her true identity from the public.
माइली स्टीवर्ट, एक औसत किशोरी लड़की, हन्ना मोंटाना नामक एक प्रसिद्ध पॉप गायिका के रूप में दोहरी जिंदगी जीती है और लगातार अपनी असली पहचान जनता से छिपाने की कोशिश करती है।
பிரபல பாடகியான மைலி, ஹானா மோன்டனா பெயரில் இரட்டை வாழ்க்கை வாழ்வதோடு, தனது உண்மையான அடையாளத்தை மறைக்க முயற்சிக்கிறார்.
మైలీ స్టీవర్ట్ అనే ఒక సాధారణ అమ్మాయి, హన్నా మోంటానా అనే ప్రసిద్ధ పాప్ సింగర్‌గా ద్వంద్వ జీవితాన్ని గడుపుతుంది.

programme.title: Good Luck Charlie
गुड लक चार्ली
குட் லக் சார்லி
గుడ్ లక్ చార్లీ
programme.desc: Three brothers, Teddy, Casey, and Gabe, whose parents enlist their help when they return to work after the birth of their fourth child, Charlie.
डंकन की ज़िंदगी में उथल-पुथल मचता है, जब वे अपने चौथे बच्चे, चार्ली का स्वागत करते हैं। हालाँकि, अराजकता होती है जब टेडी, पीजे और गेब अपने माता-पिता की अनुपस्थिति में चार्ली की देखभाल करते हैं।
டங்கன் தம்பதியினர் தங்கள் நான்காவது குழந்தையான சார்லியை வரவேற்கும்போது அவர்களின் வாழ்க்கை தலைகீழாக மாறுகிறது.
డంకన్ కుటుంబంలో నాలుగో అమ్మాయి చార్లీ రాకతో, ఆమె పెద్దక్క టెడ్డీ తమ సాహసాలు డైరీ రాసి, కానుకగా ఇవ్వాలనుకుంటుంది.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie
लिव एण्ड मैडी
லிவ் அண்ட் மேடி
లివ్ అండ్ మాడీ

लिव एण्ड मैडी
லிவ் அண்ட் மேடி
లివ్ అండ్ మాడీ

సూపర్‌స్టార్ అయిన తన కవల సోదరి లివ్ పాఠశాలకు రావడం, తమ తల్లితండ్రులు కూడా అక్కడే పనిచేయడంతో మాడీ పరిస్థితి దిగజారుతుంది.

programme.title: Wizards Beyond Waverly Place
विज़र्ड्स बिऑन्ड वेवर्ली प्लेस
விசார்ட்ஸ் பியாண்ட் வேவர்லி ப்ளேஸ்
విజర్డ్స్ బియాండ్ వేవర్లీ ప్లేస్
programme.desc: Justin Russo must shed his mortality in order to mentor his wizard niece, Billie, and help her get her powers under control.
जस्टिन रूसो को अपनी जादूगरनी भतीजी बिली का मार्गदर्शन करने और उसकी शक्तियों को नियंत्रित करने में मदद करने के लिए अपनी नश्वरता को त्यागना होगा।
ஜஸ்டின் ருஸ்ஸோ, மந்திரவாதி மருமகள் பில்லிக்கு வழிகாட்டவும், சக்திகளை கட்டுக்குள் கொண்டு வரவும் மரணத்தை கைவிட வேண்டும்.
మాంత్రికురాలైన తన మేనకోడలు బిల్లీకి మార్గదర్శకత్వం వహించడానికి జస్టిన్ రస్సో తన అమరత్వాన్ని వదులుకోవాలి.

programme.title: Wizards Beyond Waverly Place
विज़र्ड्स बिऑन्ड वेवर्ली प्लेस

விஸார்ட்ஸ் ஆஃப் வேவர்லி பிளேஸ்
విజార్డ్స్ ఆఫ్ వేవర్లీ ప్లేస్
programme.desc: Alex, Justin and Max Russo have descended from a long line of wizards. They must compete with each other in order to become the sole wizard of their family and hiding their abilities from the world.
एलेक्स, जस्टिन और मैक्स रूसो जादूगरों की एक लंबी परंपरा से निकले हैं। उन्हें अपने परिवार का एकमात्र जादूगर बनने और अपनी क्षमताओं को दुनिया से छिपाने के लिए एक-दूसरे से प्रतिस्पर्धा करनी होगी।
மந்திர சக்திகளையுடைய மூவர் குடும்பத்தின் ஒரே மந்திரவாதி ஆக மாற, தங்கள் திறன்களை மறைத்து ஒருவருக்கொருவர் மோத வேண்டும்.
న్యూయార్క్ లో ఉండే రుస్సోకుటుంబయజమాని మంత్రగాడుకావడంతో పిల్లలు కూడానేర్చుకుంటారు,అందులోనేర్పరికి మంత్రదండం ఇవ్వబడుతుంది.

programme.title: Girl Meets World
गर्ल मीट्स वर्ल्ड
கேர்ள் மீட்ஸ் வர்ல்ட்
గర్ల్ మీట్స్ వరల్డ్
programme.desc: Middle-school student Riley Matthews faces many problems growing up but finds solace in Maya Hart, her best friend, who helps her overcome all the obstacles.

मिडिल स्कूल की छात्रा रिले मैथ्यूज को बड़े होने के दौरान कई समस्याओं का सामना करना पड़ता है, लेकिन उसे अपनी सबसे अच्छी दोस्त माया हार्ट से सांत्वना मिलती है, जो उसे बाधाओं को पार करने में मदद करती है।
ரைலி மேத்யூஸ் பல பிரச்சனைகளை எதிர்கொள்கிறார், ஆனால் அவரது சிறந்த தோழியான மாயா ஹார்ட்டிடம் ஆறுதல் காண்கிறார்.
చిన్నతనం నుండి అనేక సమస్యలు ఎదుర్కొంటున్న పాఠశాల విద్యార్థి రిలే మాథ్యూస్ కి, ఆమె ప్రాణ స్నేహితురాలు మాయా అండగా ఉంటుంది.

programme.title: Girl Meets World
गर्ल मीट्स वर्ल्ड
கேர்ள் மீட்ஸ் வர்ல்ட்

programme.title: Good Luck Charlie
गुड लक चार्ली
குட் லக் சார்லி
గుడ్ లక్ చార్లీ
programme.desc: Three brothers, Teddy, Casey, and Gabe, whose parents enlist their help when they return to work after the birth of their fourth child, Charlie.
डंकन की ज़िंदगी में उथल-पुथल मचता है, जब वे अपने चौथे बच्चे, चार्ली का स्वागत करते हैं। हालाँकि, अराजकता होती है जब टेडी, पीजे और गेब अपने माता-पिता की अनुपस्थिति में चार्ली की देखभाल करते हैं।
டங்கன் தம்பதியினர் தங்கள் நான்காவது குழந்தையான சார்லியை வரவேற்கும்போது அவர்களின் வாழ்க்கை தலைகீழாக மாறுகிறது.
డంకన్ కుటుంబంలో నాలుగో అమ్మాయి చార్లీ రాకతో, ఆమె పెద్దక్క టెడ్డీ తమ సాహసాలు డైరీ రాసి, కానుకగా ఇవ్వాలనుకుంటుంది.

programme.title: Good Luck Charlie
गुड लक चार्ली
குட் லக் சார்லி
గుడ్ లక్ చార్లీ

డంకన్ కుటుంబంలో నాలుగో అమ్మాయి చార్లీ రాకతో, ఆమె పెద్దక్క టెడ్డీ తమ సాహసాలు డైరీ రాసి, కానుకగా ఇవ్వాలనుకుంటుంది.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie
लिव एण्ड मैडी
லிவ் அண்ட் மேடி
లివ్ అండ్ మాడీ
programme.desc: Maddie's life turns chaotic when her twin sister Liv, a superstar, returns to high school. Matters get worse as their parents work for the same school.
मैडी की ज़िंदगी तब उथल-पुथल हो जाती है जब उसकी जुड़वाँ बहन लिव, जो एक सुपरस्टार है, हाई स्कूल लौटती है। हालात और भी बदतर हो जाते हैं क्योंकि उनके माता-पिता भी एक ही स्कूल में काम करते हैं।
பள்ளிக்கு திரும்பும் லிவ்வால், மேடிக்கு குழப்பமானது, பெற்றோர்களும் அதே பள்ளியில் பணிபுரிவதால் விஷயங்கள் மேலும் மோசமானது.
సూపర్‌స్టార్ అయిన తన కవల సోదరి లివ్ పాఠశాలకు రావడం, తమ తల్లితండ్రులు కూడా అక్కడే పనిచేయడంతో మాడీ పరిస్థితి దిగజారుతుంది.

programme.title: Girl Meets World

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: This time the Goggleboxers watch Married at First Sight Australia, The Summit, LOL: Last One Laughing UK, Boarders, I Swear, Wheel of Fortune and Melania. (S27 Ep7) [AD,S,SL]

programme.title: Britain's Most Expensive Houses
programme.desc: The brokers at UK Sotheby's International Realty secure more multi-million-pound sales. Can Lee find a buyer for a £29m house overlooking Regents Park lake? (S2 Ep1) [AD,S,SL]

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Town's Inn (Part 2/2): Gordon continues his battle to help turn around The Town's Inn in West Virginia. Can he win over the stubborn owner and give the hotel a chance of success? (S3 Ep4) [AD,S,SL]

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: Epic adventure reality contest. In a vast, unforgiving forest, players are pitted against each other to win £100k. The Prey must hunt the money - while the Predators hunt the Prey... (Ep1) [AD,S,SL]

programme.title: The Last Leg
programme.desc: Jack Dee, GK Barry and Jason Williamson from Sleaford Mods join Adam Hills, Josh Widdicombe and Alex Brooker as they pick over the week's news. (S34 Ep8) [S,SL]

programme.title: Kirstie's House of Craft
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp makes a beehive piñata and a hot-air-balloon-inspired paper garland that's perfect for a children's party. [S]

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House New Home
programme.desc: Phil and Leighla transform their Georgian farmhouse in Stroud with an industrial-style extension, and a couple flip the layout of their Wootton Bassett Victorian end-of-terrace. (S7 Ep1/5) [AD,S,SL]

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Phil Spencer goes house-hunting in south Manchester's desirable suburbs with Craig and Becki, while Kirstie Allsopp searches the rolling Cheshire countryside with Chris and Amy. (S21 Ep2) [S]

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Jon Kay in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers. [S]

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: One for the Road (Part 1/3): Don the plumber asks Rebecca to marry him - what will she say? Sam sees Diane on a TV awards show and tries to get back in touch with her. (S11 Ep26/28) [S]

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: One for the Road (Part 2/3): Woody's new job as a city councillor enables him to help Norm get a job. And is a reconciliation on the cards for Sam and Diane? (S11 Ep27/28) [S]

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: One for the Road (Part 3/3): In the last-ever episode, Sam and Diane are plagued by doubts about the idea of getting back together, while the gang ponder the meaning of life. (S11 Ep28/28) [S]

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Peter on the Couch: When Amy invites her brother Peter to stay for dinner, he makes himself at home on the couch... and never leaves. (S8 Ep6) [AD,S]

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Liars: Ray and Debra get caught up in a web of increasingly outrageous lies after Ray fibs to Marie about why he missed a meeting with her. (S8 Ep7) [AD,S]

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: The Surprise Party: Ray reluctantly agrees to let Debra's mother throw an 'old-fashioned English tea party' for Debra. (S8 Ep8) [AD,S]

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Dr Nora: Venomous radio therapist Dr Nora (guest star Christine Baranski) joins Frasier at KACL. (S6 Ep20) [AD,S]

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: When a Man Loves Two Women: Frasier dates Cassandra, with whom he had a confusing time on Valentine's Day. Then he bumps into Faye and decides to date her too. (S6 Ep21) [AD,S]

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Visions of Daphne: Daphne gets engaged to her boyfriend Donny but then has a psychic vision that suggests he isn't the right man for her. (S6 Ep22) [AD,S]

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Shutout in Seattle (Part 1/2): Daphne's engagement to Donny upsets Niles, but Peppy from Café Nervosa provides a pick-me-up. Frasier keeps getting Faye's name wrong. (S6 Ep23) [AD,S]

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Grumpy George: Karen and Christian admit that they have 'no clue' how to run their British pub in Texas - and it shows. Can Gordon give this mishmash of ideas a sense of direction? (S9 Ep8) [S]

programme.desc: Grumpy George: Karen and Christian admit that they have 'no clue' how to run their British pub in Texas - and it shows. Can Gordon give this mishmash of ideas a sense of direction? (S9 Ep8) [S]

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Channel 4's midday news summary. [S]

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien and Max McMurdo meet retired haulier Jim in Worcestershire. Max wants to transform old air tanks into a sports car, while Simon turns some barrels into a bar bench. (S4 Ep14) [AD,S]

programme.title: Matt Baker: Our Farm in the Dales
programme.desc: Janice says goodbye to some of her beloved sheep, Matt's makeover of the patio and seating area begins to take shape, and the goats venture to pastures new. (S2 Ep4) [AD,S]

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Jon Kay in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers. [S]

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Bev and Errol can't wait to buy a Spanish holiday home in Mar Menor. Jasmine Harman shows them what their £65k can buy. [S]

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: In Spain, Jo and Ken fling open their doors to the flamboyance of flamenco. In France, Jon and Angela turn a shed into a wedding venue, with themselves as guinea pigs. (S10 Ep23/35) [S]

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The new run continues. At a quirky hotel in York that features a dungeon room full of chains, the B&Bers indulge in some BDSM: bellyaching, disagreeing, stain-hunting and moaning. [S]

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The new run continues, in the West Country. Will barber Natalia's nostalgic 90s night be a cut above the rest? Or will controversial comments make it more disaster than nostalgia? (Ep3/5) [S]

programme.title: New: A Place in the Sun: What Happened Next?
programme.desc: ...Happened Next?: Are Sarah and Jo enjoying the fruits of their labour at their olive grove house on Corfu? And how are Hannah and Gareth getting on in Salobreña? (S3 Ep8) [S]

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Channel 4's flagship news programme. Including the weather. [S]

programme.title: New: Help! I Bought It at Auction with Sarah Beeny
programme.desc: ...Auction with Sarah Beeny: Brave auction buyers convert derelict digs into diamond homes. Alison and Michael take on a pitfall palace. Jules and Al tackle a creaky Cornwall B&B. (Ep1) [AD,S]

programme.title: New: A Woman of Substance
programme.desc: Epic rags-to-riches drama with Brenda Blethyn and Jessica Reynolds. Emma's tempted by romance again for the first time since Edwin. Adele's return to Fairley threatens everything. (Ep5/8) [AD,S]

programme.title: Moors Murders
programme.desc: The Witness: The dark story of Britain's most infamous child murders, retold with eyewitness accounts and analysis of private prison letters from killers Ian Brady and Myra Hindley. (Ep1/3) [AD,S]

programme.title: Moors Murders
programme.desc: The Lost Letters: The police arrest Ian Brady. A horrific tape recording and photos lead to a search on the moors, revealing a string of victims and Myra Hindley as an accomplice. (Ep2/3) [AD,S,SL]

programme.title: Moors Murders
programme.desc: The Lost Letters: The police arrest Ian Brady. A horrific tape recording and photos lead to a search on the moors, revealing a string of victims and Myra Hindley as an accomplice. (Ep2/3) [AD,S,SL]

programme.title: Moors Murders
programme.desc: The Trial: In 1966, Brady and Hindley are brought to court. Witnesses describe the trial, and letters reveal the serial killers' prison lives as Britain's longest-serving inmates. (Ep3/3) [AD,S,SL]

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Lakeview Hotel: Gordon Ramsay confronts the owner of the Lakeview Hotel on Lake Chelan in Washington. The bedrooms are empty and the restaurant and ice cream parlour are failing. (S3 Ep5) [AD,S,SL]

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: The epic adventure reality contest continues. The first player is culled, and another heart-pounding hunt begins. Will alliances count for anything in the thrill of the chase? (Ep2) [AD,S,SL]

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House New Home
programme.desc: George takes inspiration from Japan, to help Rachel and Sarah with their Victorian terrace. And have a young couple taken on too much with a listed 17th-century cottage? (S7 Ep2/5) [AD,S,SL]

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Some extra brunch as Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer host the food and chat show. [S]

programme.title: Stacey Solomon's Renovation Rescue
programme.desc: Stacey helps a multigenerational household to create the spacious kitchen diner they've always dreamt of, and finishes off her own Mediterranean haven poolside project. (Ep6/6) [AD,S,SL]

programme.title: Location, Location, Location

programme.title: Mission to the Moon
programme.desc: In the international race to the moon, the Norwegian mission is led by brilliant inventor Reodor from the village of Flaklypa. With Louis the Magpie as the brave astronaut, what could possibly go wrong? Quite a bit, actually – on the daring mission, secret passengers are discovered, hidden agendas are revealed, and nothing seems to work out the way it was planned. Louis and his friend Luca the Hedgehog are in for some surprises on their trip to the moon. The third film in the stop-motion trilogy featuring the beloved characters from the Flaklypa universe.

programme.title: Spy Cat
programme.desc: Four crazy anti-heroes, one pawsome adventure. Join special-agent Marnie and her friends as they team up and fight crime. Spoiled and innocent, chubby house cat Marnie lives a comfortable and pampered life in the Sunshine household. She has never ventured outside the family home and only knows about the real world through her favourite detective, crime TV-shows.

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: Freddy Lupin manages to convince the pack elders to let him sit Howlington Academy’s entrance test. Freddy must use all his poodle wits- and his best friend Batty’s help!- to win a place at the historically wolf-only academy.

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: It’s the first day of school, and Freddy immediately comes into conflict with bully Ivan, who blackmails him into stealing the sacred moonstone! But when Batty is exposed to the moonstone, she’s turned into a human girl!

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: Freddy attempts to teach Batty how to be human, while searching for a cure for her new form. A class assignment to capture the mysterious ‘Golden Horn’ and prove who the ‘alpha’ wolf is goes awry when a wilderwolf attacks!

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: Freddy becomes convinced that there’s a wilderwolf at Howlington, and launches a daring investigation to prove that it’s the school accountant, Mr Sminch. Howlington gets a new teacher, the super cool and charming Ric Rawls.

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: The kids are struck down by a flea infestation, and Freddy and Batty are tasked with tracking down the mysterious Doog, keeper of the Fleaminator, the most powerful flea treatment known to dog, before they’re all expelled!

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: The kids head out on their first excursion to Night Patrol HQ. Freddy gets pulled into Scarlet’s world as she gets closer to the truth about werewolves and the two bond when they get stuck in the forest while tracking a wolf.

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: It’s Howloween, and Howlington is on lockdown. But when the students stage a play that goes wrong and the lockdown is disrupted, it will be up to the kids to save the grown-ups from themselves - including Principal Pincus!

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: Freddy and Ivan have failed their runes exam and have to do it over - or they won’t be allowed to attend the Doom Wolves concert. But their study session ends up putting themselves, and the Doom Wolves, in grave danger!

programme.title: Back to the Sea
programme.desc: When little fish Kevin is swept up in a net and taken from his home in the vast oceans to the small glass fish tank of a restaurant, he must find a way to escape and make his way back home.

programme.title: Racetime
programme.desc: Frankie and Sophie challenge newcomers Zac and Charlie to an epic sled race.

programme.title: Son of Bigfoot
programme.desc: A teenage boy journeys to find his missing father only to discover that he's actually Bigfoot.

programme.title: Ozzy
programme.desc: The lovable Ozzy’s pampered life is thrown into turmoil after his family drops him at Blue Creek before their vacation. Ozzy quickly learns that Blue Creek is a dog prison and he’ll need to rely on some new friends to help him break out and get back home.

programme.title: Stardog & Turbocat
programme.desc: A loyal dog and a vigilante cat embark on a space age voyage to find their way home.

programme.title: Rally Road Racers
programme.desc: A rookie race-car driver gets the opportunity to compete against the reigning champion. With help from a former driver, he must overcome treacherous terrain, rival racers and unexpected obstacles to prove he has what it takes.

programme.title: Cats
programme.desc: A cat named Blanket lives in the city with his son, Cape. One day, Cape decides to leave home and embarks on an adventure to find the legendary cat's paradise. To find his son, Blanket must overcome his fear and reconcile with his past.

programme.title: Tall Tales
programme.desc: When his beloved Queen bee Marguerite is kidnapped, vagabond cricket Apollo who has been framed for the crime, teams up with the other bugs to save the Queen and the entire kingdom.

programme.title: Luis and the Aliens
programme.desc: A boy at risk of being sent to boarding school by his Dad - and three aliens stranded due to watching too much TV - must help each other out.

programme.desc: After purchasing a mysterious shrink ray machine, Vick accidentally shrinks Briar, Bramble, and himself. The tiny team must put aside their differences and embark on one big journey to restore their size and their friendship.

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes Guardians of the Galaxy: The Thanos Threat
programme.desc: The Guardians of the Galaxy protect the Build Stone. When Thanos, Ronan, Nebula and the Ravagers seek to possess the Build Stone, the fate of the universe depends on the Guardians of the Galaxy to protect it.

programme.title: Fright Knight
programme.desc: Using the Book of Fear, Jestro calls forth Whipperella and uses her to trap the knights in the dark woods where they realize their darkest fears. Searching through the dark forests of the realm, Jestro finds “The Book of Fear.” It's pretty scary. But he feeds it to the book of Book of Monsters, and he uses it to call forth WHIPPERELLA, a monster that can induce fear. One-by-one she uses her “knighmarish” power on the knights and they experiences their own worst fears. Clay fears not living up to the Knights' Code. Lance fears being a nobody. Macy fears never being a knight and Axl fears having no food. Aaron must take the lead because he's fearless he does everything with reckless abandon. It's not until he leads the group out of the forest – as they fight off the Whipperella – that they we find out Aaron's true fear – the fear of peace and quiet and no more challenges or high energy escapades.

programme.title: Market Day
programme.desc: Each month there is a big market at the Speedor races. Laval and Eris go there, but Cragger has hired the Ravens to steal Laval's precious Speedor. And suddenly the prize of the races, the Golden CHI, has also disappeared.

programme.title: The Power and the Peril!

programme.title: The Snowball Effect
programme.desc: Laval and Li'Ella's relationship grows as he gives her a tour of the Lion City. But distracted, he misses a key battle against the Hunters. Tormak joins the fight and saves the day. But the Lion King Lagravis is captured and brought to the Ice Fort. Who will lead the Lions now?!?

programme.title: Saving the Mustang

programme.title: Wild Ones
programme.desc: Wild Ones draws inspiration from the rhythms of nature, delving into the wonders of the animal kingdom. This captivating series explores the diverse behaviors that define survival—hunting and feeding strategies, family bonds, defense tactics, and the intricacies of courtship and mating. Who reigns supreme in the wild? Discover the untold stories of nature's fiercest competitors and most fascinating creatures.

programme.title: VIP Pets
programme.desc: We are the VIP Pets! The coolest pets with a passion for hair! We are best friends and together we will discover lots of beautiful hairstyles and go on exciting adventures!

programme.title: Back to Back
programme.desc: Embark on an electrifying journey as they boldly leap from one heart-pounding expedition to the next, fueled by their unbreakable bond and insatiable thirst for excitement. Get ready to be swept away in a whirlwind of adrenaline-pumping quests, where danger and discovery await them at every turn.

programme.title: LMN's
programme.desc: LMN's - Underwater: Accidentally, Chip and his friends fall into a lake where they are collected by the spacecraft of a sodium atom that carries them to Sodia, an underwater city. There, the atoms of sodium and chlorine live a long conflict. The chlorine wants to join to sodium to form molecules of sodium chloride while sodium atoms prefer to remain. The patrol antimatter comes into contact with chlorine and propose them to provide rifles to dominate the sodium and so force them to molecularized, but Chip makes a fool of the antimatter and makes the chlorine and sodium are no longer enemies and prevails the peace in the underwater world.

programme.title: LMN's
programme.desc: LMN's - The storm: Inside an old wind mill in the midst of a severe storm, Chip and his friends expect it to pass and continue their way. Outside, under the stormy air, the patrol antimatter communicate to Dr. No that they have already found the boy. The evil scientist is confident that this time they will not fail. But when the wind stops, Chip devises a strategy and let the antimatter locked in the mill, as he and the atoms move on.

programme.title: TOBOT
programme.desc: Ryan and Kory are twin brothers with one big secret: They're Tobot pilots.

programme.title: Winx Club
programme.desc: Winx Club is a fantasy saga revolving around six fairies and their adventures. The protagonists Bloom, Stella, Flora, Aisha, Tecna and Musa live their daily life on Magix world, among lessons, loves, quarrels and moments of strong friendship. At any moment, when needed, they can transform into super-heroines, ready to defeat evil and save who is in danger.

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Monsuno
programme.desc: The series revolves around re-awakened Monster DNA, called Monsuno, that finds its way into the unsuspecting hands of adventure-seeking teenagers Chase, Jinja, and Bren. Accompanied by their Monsuno, Lock, Charger, and Quickforce, they are searching for Chase's father Jeredy Suno, the creator of the Monsuno

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: It's countryside chaos as Shaun The Sheep returns to the small screen with his very own series. Peace in the valley turns to mayhem in the meadow as Shaun leads his flock into all sorts of scrapes and scraps, running rings around sheepdog Bitzer when the Farmer's back is turned.

programme.title: Space Yoghurt
programme.desc: Migol, Popodom and Drod bump into unusual problems in space that they manage to solve in equally unusual ways, but at least everything ends well when you can laugh together. Follow the space creatures on their fun and wacky adventures!
